heroSubtitle: Every product undergoes rigorous testing before it leaves our facility.
introParagraphs: At SVS Polymer Industries, quality is not just a department—it's a company-wide commitment that drives everything we do. From raw material selection to final product delivery, we maintain the highest standards of quality control and assurance to ensure our customers receive products that exceed expectations.

Our state-of-the-art quality control laboratory is equipped with advanced testing equipment and staffed by experienced professionals who ensure every product meets stringent quality parameters before leaving our facility.

certifications.name: ISO 9001:2015
certifications.description: Quality Management System certification ensuring consistent quality

certifications.name: ISO 14001:2015
certifications.description: Environmental Management System for sustainable operations

certifications.name: FDA Approved
certifications.description: Food and Drug Administration approval for food-grade products

certifications.name: BIS Standards
certifications.description: Bureau of Indian Standards compliance for all products

qaSteps.title: Raw Material Selection
qaSteps.description: We source only the highest quality virgin and food-grade plastics from certified suppliers, ensuring consistency and safety.

qaSteps.title: Production Monitoring
qaSteps.description: Continuous monitoring during production with real-time quality checks ensures adherence to specifications.

qaSteps.title: Testing & Validation
qaSteps.description: Comprehensive testing including physical, chemical, and performance tests validate product quality.

qaSteps.title: Final Inspection
qaSteps.description: 100% inspection of finished products before packaging and dispatch ensures zero defects reach our customers.
